channel.title: Hanapha SEO Tools
channel.description: Free online SEO tools for keyword analysis, meta tag generation, sitemap creation, backlink checking, SERP previews, schema markup, and website optimization.

item.title: Backlink Checker
item.description: Analyze backlinks and monitor website link profiles online.

item.title: Canonical URL Generator
item.description: Generate canonical URL tags for SEO optimization.

item.title: Domain Authority Checker
item.description: Check website domain authority and SEO strength online.

item.title: Keyword Density Checker
item.description: Analyze keyword density and content optimization instantly.

item.title: Keyword Suggestion Tool
item.description: Discover keyword ideas and SEO suggestions online.

item.title: Meta Tag Generator
item.description: Generate SEO-friendly meta tags for websites easily.

item.title: Open Graph Generator
item.description: Create Open Graph tags for social media sharing.

item.title: Redirect Checker
item.description: Check URL redirects and HTTP response chains online.

item.title: Robots TXT Generator
item.description: Generate robots.txt files for search engine crawling control.

item.title: Schema Markup Generator
item.description: Generate structured data schema markup for SEO enhancement.

item.title: SERP Preview Tool
item.description: Preview how pages appear in Google search results.

item.title: Sitemap Generator
item.description: Create XML sitemaps for websites quickly and easily.

item.title: Slug Generator
item.description: Generate SEO-friendly URL slugs instantly online.

item.title: UTM Builder
item.description: Build UTM tracking URLs for marketing campaigns online.
